docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AUTORETURN AS TO DEFENDANT CORONADO, JUAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-10-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-11-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CORONADO, JUAN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CORONADO, JUAN $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $165.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,665.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER FOR AMENDED JUDGMENT RE: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING OF MAY 28, 2010
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-10-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: RUSSELL DAVIS. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR NOTICE OF INTENTION TO ISSUE AMENDED AND CORRECTED JUDGMENT AND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING SET FOR MAY-28-2010 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING OF MAY-28-2010 - AMENDED JUDGMENT ISSUED. NO APPEARANCES BY EITHER PARTY. JUDGE JAMES J. MCBRIDE, CLERK SHAWNA VANTREE, REPORTER RITA HOWELL (206).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CORONADO, JUAN $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,615.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
